summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the 5-stage Grammar Practice Engine. All backend APIs (Learn, Practice, Quiz, Guided, Free, Translate, Evaluate) return valid responses. All frontend pages load correctly with proper UI elements. Translation toggle works with Vietnamese. Word Order punctuation fix verified in code.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Grammar Engine fully tested. All 5 stages (Learn, Practice, Quiz, Guided, Free) working. Translation toggle tested with Vietnamese. Backend APIs cached in grammar_engine_cache MongoDB collection. Word Order punctuation fix verified in code at line 64 of WordOrder.js.

grammar_learn_page.details: 7 slides load (context_discovery, form, meaning, examples, common_mistakes, ielts_tip, concept_check), slide navigation with Next/Previous buttons works, slide dots clickable

grammar_learn_translation.details: Globe icon on Meaning slide opens language dropdown, Vietnamese translation appears correctly

grammar_practice_page.details: 4 sections load (Recognition, Gap Fill, Transformation, Error Correction), user can answer questions with feedback

grammar_quiz_page.details: 10 questions load with timer (5:00), difficulty badges visible, multiple question types render correctly

grammar_guided_page.details: Prompts load with word bank and textarea, submit button visible

grammar_free_page.details: Personal prompts load with textarea and submit button

grammar_engine_buttons.details: All 5 buttons (Learn, Practice, Quiz, Guided, Free) visible in Grammar section of MasteryCourse when logged in

word_order_fix.details: normalize function at line 64 of WordOrder.js correctly handles punctuation tokens (removes spaces before punctuation)

backend_apis.learn: PASS - GET /api/grammar-engine/mastery-module-1/learn returns valid JSON with slides array
backend_apis.quiz: PASS - GET /api/grammar-engine/mastery-module-1/quiz returns questions array with timer settings
backend_apis.guided: PASS - GET /api/grammar-engine/mastery-module-1/guided-prompts returns prompts with word_bank
backend_apis.translate: PASS - POST /api/grammar-engine/translate returns translation for multiple languages
backend_apis.evaluate: PASS - POST /api/grammar-engine/mastery-module-1/evaluate returns score 1-5 with feedback
